  {
    "testCaseId": "TC_DLPT_001",
    "title": "Positive Test: Verify peak downlink throughput measurement under excellent radio conditions in single isolated cell",
    "description": "Measure the maximum achievable downlink user data throughput with a stationary UE placed under excellent radio conditions inside an isolated cell with only one active UE downloading data.",
    "preconditions": [
      "Single cell scenario with no inter-cell interference",
      "UE (real or emulated) is stationary and placed under excellent radio conditions as per SINR thresholds",
      "Application server connected close to core/core emulator with sufficient transport capacity",
      "All other cells turned off"
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "Access the 5G CLI interface using `SSH admin@<IP>` and authenticate with appropriate credentials",
      "Verify the serving cell is activated and unloaded with only one active UE attached",
      "Place the UE at the cell center close to the radiated gNB antenna ensuring SINR meets excellent radio condition thresholds",
      "Power on the UE and attach it to the network",
      "Start downlink full-buffer UDP data transmission from the application server to the UE",
      "Monitor and verify stable utilization of highest possible downlink MCS, transport block size, and MIMO rank at UE",
      "Capture all required performance data including RSRP, RSRQ, CQI, PDSCH SINR, BLER, MCS, MIMO rank, throughput at UE and application server side for at least 3 minutes",
      "Stop data transmission and log capture"
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "UE receives data with minimum downlink BLER under excellent radio conditions",
      "Stable high utilization of downlink MCS, transport block size, and MIMO rank observed",
      "Downlink throughput recorded (L1 and Application layers) shows peak values",
      "Performance metrics captured with median and standard deviation reported"
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [
      "SSH admin@<IP>"
    ],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Review of captured logs for radio parameters and throughput statistics",
      "SINR verification against clause 4.6 thresholds",
      "Checking application server transmitted throughput logs"
    ]
  },
